Applying to 00010110
Input
0 0
1 0

3 1

Output
0 XNOR45 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
1 XNOR56 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR67OR0 = OR(XNOR(1,0),0) = 0

\boxed{01011101}
